steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “though” introduces a contrast between two things: what most sand gets its color from (quartz and feldspar) and what Vermelha Beach sand gets its color from (iron oxide). The blank needs punctuation that properly introduces this explanation.

steps.title: Apply the correct punctuation rule
steps.content: A colon introduces an explanation or elaboration, and the structure “though [dependent clause], [main clause]” that follows correctly presents the contrast: though most sand gets its shade from quartz and feldspar, Vermelha's iron oxide deposits create its distinctive red tint. The other options either use incorrect punctuation (A's comma; B and D's awkward separation of “though”) or create fragments. That matches choice C — C is correct.
